_doc: Tracks the last point at which we audited the team-app repo for changes that could affect the customer-portal. Updated automatically by the sync workflow.
notes: Audited commit 7f06a58 — team-app added PRODUCT_PRESETS export to shippingCalc.js. Portal already had these (carried over when shippingCalc was first ported). No portal action required from this commit. Separate change in this session: removed the weight-input gate from RequestShipmentWizard — the customer is now never asked for a weight. Resolution order is now stored → preset estimate → silent fallback (250g / 800ml). Inventory write-back only happens when source === 'estimated' (a real preset match), never when 'fallback', so the team always gets to set the true value when fulfilling.
